name: Food Truck Catering Social Posts
description: Use a reusable mixed photo-and-graphic template for a fictional food truck monetization campaign: route preorders, office catering inquiries, and private event deposits. Source-neutral Unsplash photos are passed through JSON image layers, while the route cards, offer badges, borders, and pattern work are intentional CSS geometry.
